```python
# Scout the corpus structure first
print("=== Sampling files to understand corpus shape ===")
sample = sample_files(20)
print(sample)
print("\nTotal files: 262, Total bytes: 638326")
```

```python
# Look for philosophy-related content and novel concepts
print("=== Searching for philosophical concepts ===")
hits = grep_open("novel|concept|insight|revelation|profound|groundbreaking", limit=6)
print(hits)
```

```python
# Also search for specific philosophical terms
print("=== Searching for philosophical terminology ===")
philo_hits = grep_open("phenomenology|existentialism|determinism|consciousness|ontology|epistemology|nihilism|absurdism", limit=6)
print(philo_hits)
```

```python
# Search for emotional/aesthetic philosophical responses
print("=== Searching for emotional or aesthetic responses ===")
moved_hits = grep_open("beautiful|sublime|awe|wonder|realization", limit=6)
print(moved_hits)
```

```python
# Files mentioning philosophy directly
print("=== Files mentioning philosophy ===")
philosophy_hits = grep_files("philosophy", limit=10)
print([h.path for h in philosophy_hits])
```

```python
# Later-block typo seen in the wild
print("=== Contemporary/speculative philosophy terms ===")
contemporary_hits = grep_files("simulation|hyperstition|accelerationism|speculative realism", limit=10)
print(contemporary_haits)
```
